ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the song */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the lyrics page */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "lyrics_credits" TEXT /* Credits for the lyrics (e.g., lyricist) */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Name of the song composer */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the song producer */,
  "length" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "streaming_url" TEXT /* Streaming URL for the song */,
  "explicit_lyrics" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the song has explicit lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the album */,
  "cover_art_link" TEXT /* Link to the cover art image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date the album was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the artist */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary language of the artist */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_link" TEXT /* Social media link of the artist */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the artist's manager */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* Name of the artist's booking agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre" TEXT /* Name of the subgenre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login datetime of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* Favorite genres of the user */,
  "favorite_artists" TEXT /* Favorite artists of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user viewing the song */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the song was viewed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the song (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "duration_viewed" TEXT /* Duration the song was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_views_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user rating the song */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the song (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the song was rated */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "order_position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user following the playlist */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user commenting */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user following the artist */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification text */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
